name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_uvw_purchase_requisitions_transport
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_purchase_requisitions_transport' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`created_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`changed_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`request_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`delivery_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`release_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`purchase_order_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`release_not_completed` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`created_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`changed_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`request_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`delivery_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`release_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`purchase_order_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`release_not_completed` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'created_by|changed_on|request_date|delivery_date|release_date|purchase_order_date|release_not_completed' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport`.`uvw_purchase_requisitions_transport`
